source_pr.title: *: remove MemBuffer cache and  Release method.
source_pr.body:
After we reduced the cost to create a new MemDBBuffer by provide a global random variable,
It's no longer necessary to maintain a cache which may cause data race issues.

symptoms: It's no longer necessary to maintain a cache which may cause data race issues.
failure_signature: It's no longer necessary to maintain a cache which may cause data race issues.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: remove MemBuffer cache and Release method.
fix_pattern: *: remove MemBuffer cache and  Release method.

evidence: evidence: It's no longer necessary to maintain a cache which may cause data race issues.

files: ddl/index.go, inspectkv/inspectkv.go, kv/buffer_store.go, kv/bufpool.go, kv/kv.go, kv/mem_buffer_test.go, kv/memdb_buffer.go, kv/rbtree_buffer.go, kv/union_store.go, kv/union_store_test.go, store/localstore/mvcc_test.go, store/localstore/snapshot.go, store/localstore/txn.go, store/store_test.go, store/tikv/snapshot.go, store/tikv/txn.go, store/tikv/txn_committer.go, table/tables/tables.go
